languages.text: "Я принимаю гибель вместе со священной установкой. Да хранит ее дух Омниссия, какие бы страдания нас ни ждали".

traits.locale_text: "Я принимаю гибель вместе со священной установкой. Да хранит ее дух Омниссия, какие бы страдания нас ни ждали".

languages.text: "I accept doom along with the sacred complex. May the spirit of the Omnissiah guard its spirit, no matter what torment awaits us."
languages.original_text: "Я принимаю гибель вместе со священной установкой. Да хранит ее дух Омниссия, какие бы страдания нас ни ждали".

traits.locale_text: "I accept doom along with the sacred complex. May the spirit of the Omnissiah guard its spirit, no matter what torment awaits us."
"I accept doom along with the sacred complex. May the spirit of the Omnissiah guard its spirit, no matter what torment awaits us."
"I accept doom along with the sacred complex. May the spirit of the Omnissiah guard its spirit, no matter what torment awaits us."

languages.text: “我愿与这座神圣设施一同迎接毁灭。无论等待我们的是何等折磨，都愿欧姆尼赛亚之灵可以庇护此地的灵魂。”
languages.original_text: "I accept doom along with the sacred complex. May the spirit of the Omnissiah guard its spirit, no matter what torment awaits us."

traits.locale_text: “我愿与这座神圣设施一同迎接毁灭。无论等待我们的是何等折磨，都愿欧姆尼赛亚之灵可以庇护此地的灵魂。”

languages.text: «Acepto mi perdición junto con el complejo sagrado. Que el espíritu del Omnissiah acoja el suyo, sin importar el tormento que nos espere».
languages.original_text: "I accept doom along with the sacred complex. May the spirit of the Omnissiah guard its spirit, no matter what torment awaits us."

traits.locale_text: «Acepto mi perdición junto con el complejo sagrado. Que el espíritu del Omnissiah acoja el suyo, sin importar el tormento que nos espere».

languages.text: « J'accepte mon sort et celui du complexe sacré. Puisse l'esprit de l'Omnimessie préserver son esprit, quels que soient les tourments qui nous attendent. »
languages.original_text: "I accept doom along with the sacred complex. May the spirit of the Omnissiah guard its spirit, no matter what torment awaits us."

traits.locale_text: « J'accepte mon sort et celui du complexe sacré. Puisse l'esprit de l'Omnimessie préserver son esprit, quels que soient les tourments qui nous attendent. »

languages.text: "Kutsal kompleksle birlikte kıyameti kabul ediyorum. Bizi ne tür bir azap bekliyor olursa olsun, Hermesih'in ruhu onu korusun."
languages.original_text: "I accept doom along with the sacred complex. May the spirit of the Omnissiah guard its spirit, no matter what torment awaits us."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal kompleksle birlikte kıyameti kabul ediyorum. Bizi ne tür bir azap bekliyor olursa olsun, Hermesih'in ruhu onu korusun."

languages.text: "Ich akzeptiere den Untergang mit dem heiligen Komplex. Möge der Geist des Omnissiah seinen Geist behüten, egal, welche Qualen uns erwarten."
languages.original_text: "I accept doom along with the sacred complex. May the spirit of the Omnissiah guard its spirit, no matter what torment awaits us."

traits.locale_text: "Ich akzeptiere den Untergang mit dem heiligen Komplex. Möge der Geist des Omnissiah seinen Geist behüten, egal, welche Qualen uns erwarten."

languages.text: 「聖なる複合体と共に滅びを受け入れる。オムニシアの霊が、どんな苦痛が待ち受けても、その霊を守り給え。」
languages.original_text: "I accept doom along with the sacred complex. May the spirit of the Omnissiah guard its spirit, no matter what torment awaits us."

traits.locale_text: 「聖なる複合体と共に滅びを受け入れる。オムニシアの霊が、どんな苦痛が待ち受けても、その霊を守り給え。」
